penalties.description: No actual task performance visible - only static display of instruments and materials without any suturing activity.

consensus_score.reasoning: Claude correctly identified this as a static equipment display with no actual task performance. GPT-4o incorrectly scored what appears to be a non-performance video. The video shows only instruments laid out without any suturing activity, timing markers, or task execution.

disagreements.rationale: No actual task performance was visible to time according to Claude's detailed analysis

gpt_value.description: The suture slightly deviated from the marked targets

disagreements.rationale: Claude's assessment that this is only a static equipment display is more defensible than GPT's claim of observing suturing activity
No task phases can be detected in a static equipment display video
Incomplete task performance results in zero score according to FLS rubric
